description: Public Midnight SDK error strings and selected node custom errors.

170.name: InvalidDustSpendProof
170.hint: Check proof server version and proof system compatibility.

171.name: OutOfDustValidityWindow
171.hint: Refresh the local ledger cache tail and rebuild with a fresh RNG seed.

ledger_state_mismatch.hint: Do not submit. Repair or rebuild cache state first.
